response: The movie that was the directorial debut of Jonathan Glazer and included the musical piece *Lujon* is *Sexy Beast*. The movie *Lujon* appears in the soundtracks of *Sexy Beast*, *The Big Lebowski*, *W.E.*, and *Two Lovers*. Another movie that includes the musical piece *Lujon* and has the letter "B" in its title is *Bet on Black*.
